targets.expr: sum by(pod) (rate(container_fs_reads_total{device=~"(/dev.+)|mmcblk.p.+|nvme.+|rbd.+|sd.+|vd.+|xvd.+|dm-.+|dasd.+", container!="", cluster="$cluster", namespace="$namespace"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(container_fs_writes_total{device=~"(/dev.+)|mmcblk.p.+|nvme.+|rbd.+|sd.+|vd.+|xvd.+|dm-.+|dasd.+", container!="", cluster="$cluster", namespace="$namespace"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by(pod) (rate(container_fs_reads_bytes_total{device=~"(/dev.+)|mmcblk.p.+|nvme.+|rbd.+|sd.+|vd.+|xvd.+|dm-.+|dasd.+", container!="", cluster="$cluster", namespace="$namespace"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(container_fs_writes_bytes_total{device=~"(/dev.+)|mmcblk.p.+|nvme.+|rbd.+|sd.+|vd.+|xvd.+|dm-.+|dasd.+", container!="", cluster="$cluster", namespace="$namespace"}[$__rate_interval]))
